title: Gunsmoke Ranch
writer: Oliver Drake, Jack Natteford, William Colt MacDonald
actors: Robert Livingston, Ray Corrigan, Max Terhune
plot: Flagg is relocating flood victims to Gunsmoke Ranch. The Three Mesquiteers know Flagg to be a crook and try to warn them. They ignore the warning and improve the land only to find that it has been condemned for a new dam.
